options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies a set of coordinates within which to trim metal fill

options.name: -clock
options.description: Specifies whether trim around all clock

options.name: -createFillBlockage
options.description: Create fill blockage with the specified name, so later fill steps will not re-fill the trimmed area

options.name: -layer
options.description: Only trim fill on list of layer names

options.name: -minTrimDensity
options.description: {<percent1> <layer_list1> [{<percent2> <layer_list2>}]…} Only trim until meet the given percent window density. { <percent1> <layer_list1> [ {<percent2> <layer_list2>} ]…}

options.name: -minTrimUnionDensityToAboveLayer
options.description: {<percent1> <layer_list1> [{<percent2> <layer_list2>}]…} Only trim until meet the given percent window density. { <percent1> <layer_list1> [ {<percent2> <layer_list2>} ]…}

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies a list of critical net names or pointers which are surrounded by metal fill

options.name: -recomputeDensity
options.description: Force a call to verifyMetalDensity to re-compute window densities, rather than use stored densities in the DB

options.name: -remove
options.description: If set, metal-fill shapes overlapping the critical-net halo area are removed entirely rather than trimming

options.name: -slackThreshold
options.description: Trimming around nets with slack less than slack_in_ns

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Trim fill on same layer by dist_in_um around critical net routes

options.name: -spacingAbove
options.description: Trim fill on above layer by dist_in_um around critical net routes

options.name: -spacingBelow
options.description: Trim fill on below layer by dist_in_um around critical net routes
